<h2>Changes</h2>
<h2>🚀 Features</h2>
<ul>
<li>feat: source caching <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/loispostula/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/loispostula">@loispostula</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4189581368" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8291" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8291/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8291">#8291</a>)</li>
<li>feat: golang module support pseudo version <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/olblak/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/olblak">@olblak</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4201532472" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8293" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8293/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8293">#8293</a>)</li>
<li>feat(github): add client-side pull request merge option <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/LeC-D/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/LeC-D">@LeC-D</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4159846357" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8204" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8204/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8204">#8204</a>)</li>
<li>feat: add PyPI resource and pyproject autodiscovery plugins <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/loispostula/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/loispostula">@loispostula</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4138698423" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8155" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8155/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8155">#8155</a>)</li>
<li>feat(telemetry): add OpenTelemetry tracing for pipeline execution <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/loispostula/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/loispostula">@loispostula</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4110392962" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8055" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8055/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8055">#8055</a>)</li>
<li>feat: allow to filter compose policies based on policy id <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/olblak/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/olblak">@olblak</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4181357168" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8246" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8246/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8246">#8246</a>)</li>
<li>feat(version): add pep440 version kind <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/loispostula/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/loispostula">@loispostula</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4180229106" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8245" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8245/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8245">#8245</a>)</li>
</ul>
<h2>🐛 Bug Fixes</h2>
<ul>
<li>fix(yaml): compare decoded scalar values to avoid rewriting folded blocks <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/loispostula/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/loispostula">@loispostula</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4220086921" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8296" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8296/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8296">#8296</a>)</li>
<li>fix(github): nil-check token source to avoid panic when no token configured <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/loispostula/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/loispostula">@loispostula</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4220137694" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8298" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8298/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8298">#8298</a>)</li>
</ul>
